code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut count = 0
mut in_token = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    in_token = false
  else
    if not in_token
      count = count + 1
      in_token = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut state = 0
mut j = 0
while j < count
  state = (state + 1) % 3
  j = j + 1
end

let name = match state
when 0
  "Red"
when 1
  "Green"
when _
  "Yellow"
end

print(name)
